pr.title: Record: Add PPM heuristic for test time learning

output.summary: Adds delayed outside-context PPM bank reusing the 10L Int5-MLP BigramHash model to supply long-range targets during inference.
techniques: Delayed 2048-token PPM bank holding only targets beyond the current context
Fixed inference k/min/boost configuration for PPM bank
Self-contained trie-based inference snapshot for leaderboard submission
